subcodes.title: Words spoken at 97 Cadogan Gardens in London, ca. 1913(1911?)
subcodes.first_line: Teachers of the Cause must have courtesy and forbearance. They must be the essence of sanctity—informed, moved by the divine teachings, knowledgeable and well apprised
subcodes.first_line_orig: مبلغ باید مدارا داشته باشد جوهر تقدیس باشد اطلاعات داشته
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @priority over other activities in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
